system.Text:
When __you retire from your life as Ironsworn__, you may recount your story and determine how it sends. Roll the challenge dice and compare to each of your legacy tracks: quests, bonds, and discoveries (one roll per track).

For each __strong hit__, use the corresponding option from below, or from the weak hit or miss options, as inspriration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: You are celebrated in song, renowned in a mythic tale, or honored with titles.
  * Bonds: Your friends are numerous, or you sepnd your remaining days with the one you envisioned.
  * Discoveries: You retire to an idyllic location, or you are wise in your old age and many seek your counsel.

For each __weak hit__, use the corresponding option from below, or from the miss option as inspiration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: Most consider you successful and respect you. But your fame is short lived, or something is left unfinished that troubles you.
  * Bonds: You can count a few as trusted friends. But you will always live apart or you find yourself tied to someone you did not foresee.
  * Discoveries: You've seen a thing or two in this world. But a far simpler life awaits you, or you are forced to settle somewhere not of your choosing.

For each __miss__, use the corresponding option as inspiration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: Heavy regret haunts you to your grave, or a former foe has gained tremendous power.
  * Bonds: You are left with no friends, or someone you once held dear stands in stark opposition to your legacy or values.
  * Discoveries: You have no home to call your own, or something you discovered in your journeys has unexpected dire consequences.

Trigger.Text: When you retire from your life as Ironsworn...

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, use the corresponding option from below, or from the weak hit or miss options, as inspriration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: You are celebrated in song, renowned in a mythic tale, or honored with titles.
  * Bonds: Your friends are numerous, or you sepnd your remaining days with the one you envisioned.
  * Discoveries: You retire to an idyllic location, or you are wise in your old age and many seek your counsel.

Weak Hit.Text:
On a __weak hit__, use the corresponding option from below, or from the miss option as inspiration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: Most consider you successful and respect you. But your fame is short lived, or something is left unfinished that troubles you.
  * Bonds: You can count a few as trusted friends. But you will always live apart or you find yourself tied to someone you did not foresee.
  * Discoveries: You've seen a thing or two in this world. But a far simpler life awaits you, or you are forced to settle somewhere not of your choosing.

Miss.Text:
On a __miss__, use the corresponding option as inspiration. Then, envision it.

  * Quests: Heavy regret haunts you to your grave, or a former foe has gained tremendous power.
  * Bonds: You are left with no friends, or someone you once held dear stands in stark opposition to your legacy or values.
  * Discoveries: You have no home to call your own, or something you discovered in your journeys has unexpected dire consequences.
